differential_diagnoses: Occult primary neoplasm (e.g., lung or pancreatic cancer)
Acute myeloid leukemia or other myeloid neoplasm
Disseminated intravascular coagulation (secondary to malignancy or pancreatitis)
Infectious process (e.g., disseminated tuberculosis or fungal infection)
next_steps: Bone marrow aspiration and biopsy with flow cytometry and cytogenetics
Diagnostic thoracentesis or biopsy of lung nodules
Repeat imaging (CT chest or PET/CT) to re-evaluate lung and liver lesions
Serum cytokine panel including soluble IL-2 receptor (sCD25) to assess for HLH
Stool studies and further evaluation for occult gastrointestinal malignancy
Initiate supportive care with blood products as indicated by symptoms and active bleeding
